name: Trigger Daily Notifications
script:
if frappe.session.user != "raghav.bansal@sevenlabs.in":
    frappe.throw("Only admin can trigger this")

today_date = frappe.utils.today()
count = 0

def get_task_users(task):
    users = []
    if task.owner and task.owner != "Administrator":
        users.append(task.owner)
    todos = frappe.get_all("ToDo",
        filters={"reference_type": "Task", "reference_name": task.name, "status": "Open"},
        fields=["allocated_to"])
    for t in todos:
        if t.allocated_to and t.allocated_to not in users:
            users.append(t.allocated_to)
    return users

tasks_due = frappe.get_all("Task",
    filters={"status": ["in", ["Open", "Working", "Pending Review", "Overdue"]],
             "exp_end_date": ["between", [today_date + " 00:00:00", today_date + " 23:59:59"]]},
    fields=["name", "subject", "owner"])

for task in tasks_due:
    users = get_task_users(task)
    for user in users:
        nlog = frappe.new_doc("Notification Log")
        nlog.for_user = user
        nlog.from_user = "Administrator"
        nlog.subject = "Task due today: " + str(task.subject or task.name)
        nlog.type = "Alert"
        nlog.document_type = "Task"
        nlog.document_name = task.name
        nlog.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        count = count + 1

overdue = frappe.get_all("Task",
    filters=[["status", "in", ["Open", "Working", "Pending Review", "Overdue"]],
             ["exp_end_date", "<", today_date],
             ["exp_end_date", "is", "set"]],
    fields=["name", "subject", "owner"])

for task in overdue:
    users = get_task_users(task)
    for user in users:
        nlog = frappe.new_doc("Notification Log")
        nlog.for_user = user
        nlog.from_user = "Administrator"
        nlog.subject = "OVERDUE: " + str(task.subject or task.name)
        nlog.type = "Alert"
        nlog.document_type = "Task"
        nlog.document_name = task.name
        nlog.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        count = count + 1

if overdue:
    nlog = frappe.new_doc("Notification Log")
    nlog.for_user = "raghav.bansal@sevenlabs.in"
    nlog.from_user = "Administrator"
    nlog.subject = str(len(overdue)) + " tasks overdue - escalation"
    nlog.type = "Alert"
    nlog.document_type = "Task"
    nlog.document_name = overdue[0].name
    nlog.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    count = count + 1

frappe.db.commit()
frappe.response["message"] = "Sent " + str(count) + " notifications (due_today=" + str(len(tasks_due)) + ", overdue=" + str(len(overdue)) + ")"

name: Reassign Task API
script:
task_name = frappe.form_dict.get("task_name")
new_assignee = frappe.form_dict.get("new_assignee")

if not task_name or not new_assignee:
    frappe.response["message"] = {"success": False, "error": "task_name and new_assignee are required"}
else:
    doc = frappe.get_doc("Task", task_name)
    user = frappe.session.user
    
    is_owner = (doc.owner == user)
    is_admin = frappe.db.exists("Has Role", {"parent": user, "role": "System Manager"})
    assign_str = frappe.db.get_value("Task", task_name, "_assign") or "[]"
    current_assigns = json.loads(assign_str)
    is_assignee = (user in current_assigns)
    
    if is_owner or is_admin or is_assignee:
        old_todos = frappe.db.get_all("ToDo", filters={"reference_type": "Task", "reference_name": task_name, "status": "Open"}, fields=["name"])
        for todo in old_todos:
            frappe.db.set_value("ToDo", todo.name, "status", "Cancelled")
        
        task_subject = frappe.db.get_value("Task", task_name, "subject") or task_name
        new_todo = frappe.get_doc({
            "doctype": "ToDo",
            "owner": new_assignee,
            "allocated_to": new_assignee,
            "reference_type": "Task",
            "reference_name": task_name,
            "description": task_subject,
            "status": "Open"
        })
        new_todo.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        
        frappe.db.set_value("Task", task_name, "_assign", json.dumps([new_assignee]))
        
        old_names = ", ".join(current_assigns) if current_assigns else "Unassigned"
        new_user_name = frappe.db.get_value("User", new_assignee, "full_name") or new_assignee
        comment_text = "Task reassigned from " + old_names + " to " + new_user_name + " by " + user
        frappe.get_doc({
            "doctype": "Comment",
            "reference_doctype": "Task",
            "reference_name": task_name,
            "comment_type": "Info",
            "content": comment_text
        }).insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        
        frappe.db.commit()
        frappe.response["message"] = {"success": True, "message": "Task reassigned to " + new_user_name}
    else:
        frappe.response["message"] = {"success": False, "error": "Only the task creator, current assignee, or admin can reassign"}
